utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You are driving me crazy with that !

emotion_cause.span: 1_You are driving me crazy with that !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Do not stop ! Move the bowl further away ! Ross could make that shot !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , you suck ! But at least you suck at a man game now .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Chandler , I can not be playing games , Ross is gonna be home soon .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I can not be playing games , Ross is gonna be home soon .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And I have to write five whole pages if I am gonna stick to his schedule .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , so , play for the next 30 minutes and then write until he gets home .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right ! But uh , listen , what do you say we crank it up a notch ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right , all we need is a little lighter fluid .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , but be careful okay , because I wanna get our security deposit back .

emotion_cause.span: 11_all we need is a little lighter fluid .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah , I think we said good ... bye to that when we invented hammer darts .

emotion_cause.span: 13_we said good ... bye to that when we invented hammer darts .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Do you even remember which part of the wall is not spackle ?
